Blake:



Blake Crothers For an online dating / tinder front end:1. Unique Mechanism Behind the Problem our Prospect Faces.Problem = they don't get matches on dating sites like tinder, bumble, match, hinge etc.The mechanism behind the problem = the online dating “blacklist”.Apps will hide or “blacklist” dating profiles if you make any one of the 3 innocent mistakes with your dating profile…So it doesn’t take much… And once you’re blacklisted your profile won’t be shown to any high quality women on the apps.It’s like standing behind tinted glass. You can see them and watch all the hotties walk by…. But they will never see you or your profile.2. Unique Mechanism Behind the Solution to that Problem.We'll show you how to get off and stay off the blacklist immediately by fixing the 3 most common mistakes. so you can start getting matches with women you're actually interested in again...





SPG: What are the three mistakes?

1. Swiping constantly

2. Profiles are trash

3. 



Named Mechanism:



Curb Aggression

Neuter Aggression 

War on Masculinity





UMP: Secret Blakclist

Why: You’re told to play the field, and it’s a numbers game, but the apps work the opposite way. Algorithm see low percentage of matches and you end up on a secret blacklist. 



UMS: Get off the blacklist, doing an algorithmic reset. Compare to making a bad first impression with a chick. It sucks but she never changes her opinion about you after. You’re screwed usually, or it takes a year to change her mind. Same thing with the algorithm. 



Big overview of UMP

Blacklist



Micro or more Granular Version (Why Blacklist)?

Algorithm sees low percentage of matches and you end up on a secret blacklist. So it’s the opposite of what you’ve been told – numbers game backfires and you end up blacklisted.  



If that’s the case what needs to happen?

Reset the algorithm. 



Can that be done?

Yes



How Can Be It Done?

This is either answered in the copy, and then you present product as a packaged version of the answer…



Or the product is the answer itself and you’re selling that. .
